nodes.name: Naruto Uzumaki
nodes.bio: A hyperactive ninja who hosts the Nine-Tails Fox, driven by his dream to become Hokage.

nodes.name: Sasuke Uchiha
nodes.bio: A gifted ninja consumed by revenge against his brother.

nodes.name: Itachi Uchiha
nodes.bio: A prodigy who massacred his own clan to protect the village, carrying a terrible secret.

nodes.name: Kakashi Hatake
nodes.bio: The Copy Ninja, mentoring Team 7 with hidden grief.

nodes.name: Monkey D. Luffy
nodes.bio: A rubber-powered pirate captain with an unshakable dream of becoming King of the Pirates.

nodes.name: Roronoa Zoro
nodes.bio: A three-sword-style swordsman sworn to become the world's greatest.

nodes.name: Nico Robin
nodes.bio: An archaeologist who survived the annihilation of her island.

nodes.name: Eren Yeager
nodes.bio: A soldier who can transform into a Titan, whose desire for freedom drives him toward an apocalyptic plan.

nodes.name: Levi Ackerman
nodes.bio: Humanity's strongest soldier, ruthless in battle but fiercely protective of those under his command.

nodes.name: Mikasa Ackerman
nodes.bio: A prodigiously skilled soldier whose entire world revolves around protecting Eren.

nodes.name: Light Yagami
nodes.bio: A genius student who acquires a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it.

nodes.name: L Lawliet
nodes.bio: The world's greatest detective and Light's sole intellectual equal.

nodes.name: Edward Elric
nodes.bio: A young alchemist who sacrificed his limbs attempting to resurrect his mother.

nodes.name: Roy Mustang
nodes.bio: The Flame Alchemist, ambitious and calculating, whose ultimate goal is to become Fuhrer.

nodes.name: Gon Freecss
nodes.bio: An optimistic boy hunting for his absent father while pushing the limits of a Hunter.

nodes.name: Killua Zoldyck
nodes.bio: Born into a family of assassins, Killua befriends Gon and gradually breaks free from his brutal upbringing.

nodes.name: Tanjiro Kamado
nodes.bio: A kind-hearted boy who becomes a Demon Slayer after his family is massacred.

nodes.name: Nezuko Kamado
nodes.bio: Tanjiro's sister, turned into a demon yet retaining her humanity.

nodes.name: Gojo Satoru
nodes.bio: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer alive, whose Infinity technique makes him practically untouchable.

nodes.name: Lelouch vi Britannia
nodes.bio: A deposed prince who acquires the power of absolute command to topple an empire.
